pkgmetadata.longdescription: Thin command-line wrapper around brave/adblock-rust that converts EasyList/ABP-format filter lists into Apple's WKContentRuleList JSON format — the format consumed by WebKit's WebKitUserContentFilterStore API. Written to feed the WebKit-native content-filter pipeline used by zentoo's vimb ad-blocking layer, but general-purpose: any WebKit-based application that consumes WKContentRuleList JSON can use its output.
